languages.text: {n}Женщина вскидывает оружие — вслед за ней вас берут на прицел остальные Арбитес.{/n} "Я требую объяснений, Вольный Торговец. Почему мы не можем заблокировать "Забвение"? Кто ваш сообщник?"
{n}The Proctor raises her weapon, followed by the rest of the Arbitrators.{/n} "I demand an explanation, Rogue Trader. Why can't we block the Oblivion? Who is your accomplice?"
languages.original_text: {n}Женщина вскидывает оружие — вслед за ней вас берут на прицел остальные Арбитес.{/n} "Я требую объяснений, Вольный Торговец. Почему мы не можем заблокировать "Забвение"? Кто ваш сообщник?"

traits.locale_text: {n}The woman raises her weapon, followed by the rest of the Arbites.{/n} "I demand an explanation, Rogue Trader. Why can't we block the Oblivion? Who is your accomplice?"

{n}The Proctor raises her weapon, followed by the rest of the Arbitrators.{/n} "I demand an explanation, Rogue Trader. Why can't we block the Oblivion? Who is your accomplice?"

languages.text: {n}La Procuradora levanta su arma, seguida del resto de Arbitrator.{/n} «Exijo una explicación, Comerciante. ¿Por qué no podemos bloquear el Olvido? ¿Quién es su cómplice?».
languages.original_text: {n}The Proctor raises her weapon, followed by the rest of the Arbitrators.{/n} "I demand an explanation, Rogue Trader. Why can't we block the Oblivion? Who is your accomplice?"

traits.locale_text: {n}La Procuradora levanta su arma, seguida del resto de Arbitrator.{/n} «Exijo una explicación, Comerciante. ¿Por qué no podemos bloquear el Olvido? ¿Quién es su cómplice?».

languages.text: {n}耶格尔举起了武器，其他法务官紧随其后。{/n}“我要求你给我个解释，行商浪人。我们为什么无法阻止湮灭协议？你的同伙是谁？”
languages.original_text: {n}The Proctor raises her weapon, followed by the rest of the Arbitrators.{/n} "I demand an explanation, Rogue Trader. Why can't we block the Oblivion? Who is your accomplice?"

traits.locale_text: {n}耶格尔举起了武器，其他法务官紧随其后。{/n}“我要求你给我个解释，行商浪人。我们为什么无法阻止湮灭协议？你的同伙是谁？”

languages.text: {n}彼女は武器を取り、残りのアービトレイターが後に付いていく。{/n}「ローグトレーダー、説明を求めます。一緒に滅却プロトコルを阻止できませんか？誰があなたの共犯者なのですか？」
languages.original_text: {n}The Proctor raises her weapon, followed by the rest of the Arbitrators.{/n} "I demand an explanation, Rogue Trader. Why can't we block the Oblivion? Who is your accomplice?"

traits.locale_text: {n}彼女は武器を取り、残りのアービトレイターが後に付いていく。{/n}「ローグトレーダー、説明を求めます。一緒に滅却プロトコルを阻止できませんか？誰があなたの共犯者なのですか？」

languages.text: {n}La proctor brandit son arme, aussitôt imitée par le reste des arbitrators.{/n} « J'exige des explications, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Pourquoi ne peut-on interrompre l'Oblitération ? Qui est votre complice ? »
languages.original_text: {n}The Proctor raises her weapon, followed by the rest of the Arbitrators.{/n} "I demand an explanation, Rogue Trader. Why can't we block the Oblivion? Who is your accomplice?"

traits.locale_text: {n}La proctor brandit son arme, aussitôt imitée par le reste des arbitrators.{/n} « J'exige des explications, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Pourquoi ne peut-on interrompre l'Oblitération ? Qui est votre complice ? »

languages.text: {n}Üsteğmen silahını doğrultuyor. Ardından diğer Yargıcılar da ona katılıyor.{/n} "Açıklama talep ediyorum Hür Tacir. Neden Yıkılış'ı engelleyemiyoruz? Suç ortağın kim?"
languages.original_text: {n}The Proctor raises her weapon, followed by the rest of the Arbitrators.{/n} "I demand an explanation, Rogue Trader. Why can't we block the Oblivion? Who is your accomplice?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Üsteğmen silahını doğrultuyor. Ardından diğer Yargıcılar da ona katılıyor.{/n} "Açıklama talep ediyorum Hür Tacir. Neden Yıkılış'ı engelleyemiyoruz? Suç ortağın kim?"

languages.text: {n}Als die Proktorin ihre Waffe hebt, folgen die übrigen Arbitratoren ihrem Beispiel.{/n} "Ich verlange eine Erklärung, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Warum dürfen wir die Vergessenheit nicht blockieren? Wer ist Euer Komplize?"
